name: Coding Agents Lens
purpose: Extract workflows, patterns, and techniques for using AI coding agents effectively — what to steal, adopt, and adapt for your own coding agent setup.
questions: What specific coding agent workflow is demonstrated?
What prompt patterns or interaction styles make the agent more effective?
What tools, flags, or modes are used and why?
How does the human steer or supervise the agent?
What failure modes are shown and how are they handled?
What parallelism or multi-agent patterns are used?
What context management techniques are demonstrated?
Is this pattern directly adoptable in our setup (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI)?
ignoreRules: Generic AI hype with no concrete agent workflow
Enterprise-only patterns requiring infrastructure we don't have
Demo tricks that don't generalise to real work
